nl_prompt: What is the total number of products in our catalog?
generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS product_count FROM products

nl_prompt: What was our highest single-order revenue ever?
generated_sql:
SELECT MAX(line_value) AS max_single_order_revenue
FROM orders

nl_prompt: How many orders were cancelled this year?
generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cancelled_orders_count
FROM orders
WHERE status = 'Cancelled' AND YEAR(order_date) = YEAR(current_date)

nl_prompt: What is our total revenue for Electronics products?
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(line_value) AS total_revenue
FROM orders
JOIN order_items ON orders.id = order_items.order_id
JOIN products ON order_items.product_id = products.id
WHERE products.category = 'Electronics'

nl_prompt: How many orders shipped in the last 30 days?
generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM orders 
WHERE ship_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 30 DAY

nl_prompt: What is the revenue for the top-selling product?
generated_sql:
SELECT p.name AS product_name, SUM(o.line_value) AS total_revenue
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY p.name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 1

nl_prompt: How many new customers signed up this year?
generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS new_customers_count
FROM customers
WHERE created_at >= '2023-01-01'

nl_prompt: What is our total cost of goods sold this year?

FROM orders
JOIN order_items ON orders.id = order_items.order_id
JOIN products ON order_items.product_id = products.id
WHERE YEAR(orders.order_date) = YEAR(CURDATE())

nl_prompt: What percentage of orders were returned?
generated_sql:
SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.return_date IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.id) AS return_percentage
FROM orders AS T1
LEFT JOIN returns AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.order_id

nl_prompt: How many distinct product categories do we sell?
generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT category) FROM products

nl_prompt: What was our total revenue last year?
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(line_value) AS total_revenue_last_year
FROM orders
WHERE YEAR(order_date) = YEAR(current_date) - 1

nl_prompt: What is the revenue breakdown by product category?
generated_sql:
SELECT p.category, SUM(o.line_value) AS total_revenue
FROM orders o
JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY p.category

nl_prompt: Which customers placed more than 5 orders?
generated_sql:
SELECT c.name
FROM customers c
JOIN (
    SELECT customer_id, COUNT(*) AS order_count
    FROM orders
    GROUP BY customer_id
) o ON c.id = o.customer_id
WHERE o.order_count > 5

nl_prompt: Who are our top 10 customers by lifetime revenue?
generated_sql:
SELECT c.name AS customer_name, SUM(o.line_value) AS total_revenue
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10

nl_prompt: Which product categories have more than 10 percent return rate?
generated_sql:
SELECT p.category
FROM products p
JOIN order_items oi ON p.id = oi.product_id
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id
LEFT JOIN returns r ON o.id = r.order_id
GROUP BY p.category
HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN r.return_date IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(o.id) > 10

nl_prompt: What is the revenue per customer segment?
generated_sql:
SELECT c.segment, SUM(o.line_value) AS total_revenue
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
GROUP BY c.segment

nl_prompt: Which sales rep closed the most orders?
generated_sql:
SELECT s.rep_name, COUNT(o.id) AS order_count
FROM sales_reps s
JOIN orders o ON s.id = o.sales_rep_id
GROUP BY s.rep_name
ORDER BY order_count DESC
LIMIT 1

nl_prompt: What is the monthly revenue trend for the last 12 months?
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', order_date) AS month,
    SUM(line_value) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    orders
WHERE 
    order_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
GROUP BY 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', order_date)
ORDER BY 
    month

GROUP BY p.name
HAVING order_count = 0

nl_prompt: What is the average order value per customer segment?
generated_sql:
SELECT c.segment, AVG(o.line_value) AS avg_order_value
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
GROUP BY c.segment

nl_prompt: What is the revenue from completed orders versus pending orders?
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN o.status = 'Completed' THEN SUM(o.line_value)
        ELSE 0
    END AS completed_revenue,
    CASE 
        WHEN o.status = 'Pending' THEN SUM(o.line_value)
        ELSE 0
    END AS pending_revenue
FROM 
    orders o
GROUP BY 
    o.status

nl_prompt: Which product has the highest total quantity sold?
generated_sql:
SELECT p.name AS product_name, SUM(o.quantity) AS total_quantity_sold
FROM orders o
JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY p.name
ORDER BY total_quantity_sold DESC
LIMIT 1

nl_prompt: What is the total discount given across all orders?
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(discount_pct * line_value) AS total_discount
FROM orders

nl_prompt: What is the average number of items per order by category?
generated_sql:
SELECT p.category, AVG(o.quantity) AS avg_items_per_order
FROM orders o
JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY p.category

nl_prompt: What percentage of revenue comes from our top 20 percent of customers?
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN c.segment IN ('Top 20%') THEN o.line_value ELSE 0 END) * 100 / SUM(o.line_value) AS top_20_percent_revenue_percentage
FROM 
    customers c
JOIN 
    orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
WHERE 
    c.segment IN ('Top 20%')

nl_prompt: Which customers with active CRM deals had delivery issues?
generated_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.name
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
JOIN logistics_deliveries ld ON o.shipping_id = ld.tracking_id
WHERE o.status IN ('Pending', 'Shipped')
  AND ld.status_code != 0

nl_prompt: What is the average deal size for customers whose deliveries were delayed?
generated_sql:
SELECT AVG(sf_opportunities.amount) AS average_deal_size
FROM sf_opportunities
JOIN logistics_deliveries ON sf_opportunities.account_id = logistics_deliveries.shipping_ref
WHERE logistics_deliveries.status_code != 100

nl_prompt: Which of our top 10 revenue customers have an open CRM opportunity?
generated_sql:
SELECT c.name AS customer_name
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
WHERE o.status = 'Open'
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY SUM(o.line_value) DESC
LIMIT 10

nl_prompt: What is the delivery success rate for Enterprise segment customers?
generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN ld.status_code = 1 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / COUNT(*) AS delivery_success_rate
FROM orders o
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
JOIN logistics_deliveries ld ON o.shipping_id = ld.tracking_id
WHERE c.segment = 'Enterprise'

WHERE op.stage = 'Closed Won'

JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id

nl_prompt: What is the on-time delivery rate by CRM deal stage?

    sfopp.stage AS deal_stage,

JOIN 
    logistics_deliveries ld ON o.shipping_id = ld.tracking_id

    sf_opportunities sfopp ON o.product_id = sfopp.account_id

    sfopp.stage

nl_prompt: Which logistics carrier has the worst on-time rate for top revenue customers?
generated_sql:
SELECT ld.carrier_name, AVG(CASE WHEN o.line_value > (SELECT AVG(line_value) FROM orders WHERE customer_id IN (SELECT c.id FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id ORDER BY o.line_value DESC LIMIT 10)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS on_time_rate
FROM logistics_deliveries ld
JOIN orders o ON ld.tracking_id = o.shipping_id
GROUP BY ld.carrier_name

nl_prompt: Summarize delivery complaint themes for top 10 revenue customers.
generated_sql:
SELECT c.name AS customer_name, COUNT(ld.tracking_id) AS complaint_count
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
JOIN logistics_deliveries ld ON o.shipping_id = ld.tracking_id
WHERE o.status = 'Cancelled' OR o.status = 'Failed'
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY complaint_count DESC
LIMIT 10

FROM products p
JOIN reviews r ON p.id = r.product_id
GROUP BY p.category
ORDER BY average_sentiment DESC
LIMIT 1

nl_prompt: What common complaints appear for delayed shipments?
generated_sql:
SELECT reason 
FROM returns 
WHERE order_id IN (
    SELECT order_id 
    FROM orders 
    WHERE status = 'Delayed'
) 
GROUP BY reason

nl_prompt: Find customers who mentioned competitors in support.
generated_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.name
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
WHERE o.status LIKE '%competitors%'

nl_prompt: What were top 3 reasons for returns?
generated_sql: SELECT reason FROM returns GROUP BY reason ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 3

nl_prompt: Which sales reps have customers with most positive feedback?
generated_sql:
SELECT s.rep_name
FROM sales_reps s
JOIN orders o ON s.id = o.sales_rep_id
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
WHERE c.segment = 'Positive Feedback'
GROUP BY s.rep_name
ORDER BY COUNT(c.id) DESC
LIMIT 1

nl_prompt: Summarize key themes for Enterprise segment accounts.
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.segment AS Segment,
    COUNT(o.id) AS TotalOrders,
    SUM(o.line_value) AS TotalRevenue,
    AVG(o.ship_date - o.order_date) AS AverageLeadTime,
    COUNT(r.id) AS ReturnCount,
    SUM(r.refund_amount) AS TotalRefunds
FROM 
    customers c
JOIN 
    orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
LEFT JOIN 
    returns r ON o.id = r.order_id
WHERE 
    c.segment = 'Enterprise'
GROUP BY 
    c.segment

nl_prompt: Which logistics partners have most damaged goods complaints?
generated_sql: SELECT carrier_name FROM logistics_deliveries WHERE status_code = 1 GROUP BY carrier_name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

nl_prompt: Find orders where complaints mention product defects.

SELECT o.id AS order_id, o.line_value AS total_revenue
